title: DTD Default Mapping
text: DTD Default Mapping Define a default mapping between element names in the DTD and Uniface field and entity names. The default mapping is used by the ProcScript statements xmlload and xmlsave when the statements are invoked with the /incldefmap switch. Alternatively, xmlsave and xmlload can use, ignore, or over-ride this default mapping. Fields DTD Item Name Uniface Name How to Defining DTD Mappings Related Links Mapping Between Uniface and XML Streams Uniface field and entity names can be mapped to elements in XML streams. This enables Uniface to transport values between XML streams and component fields. Default mappings can be defined for the application model and local mappings can be made for component data. xmlload Load data from an XML stream into occurrences drawn on the component. xmlsave Places component data in an XML stream.
